cid:6924439192396309311.note: A spacious garden for slowing down between dense Tokyo neighborhoods, especially when you need a quiet reset.

cid:6924439458418082721.note: A straightforward Harajuku lunch stop with a tight menu, quick service, and a burger worth planning around if you are nearby.

cid:6924438073363786761.note: Go for the retro Tokyo icon, city views, and a clear orientation point on the Minato side of town.
